step_catalog.distribution.release_manifest_verify: verify the committed release manifest when a dist root is present
step_catalog.ecosystem.negotiation_smoke: negotiate client/server endpoint descriptors and verify the negotiation record
step_catalog.ecosystem.pack_verify: run deterministic pack verification against the governed repo surface
step_catalog.heavy.convergence_gate: optionally rerun the convergence gate with cross-platform lanes disabled
step_catalog.smoke.build_ids: compute deterministic build ids from the env descriptor and source identity
step_catalog.smoke.endpoint_descriptors: emit deterministic endpoint descriptors for the environment-supported product set
step_catalog.smoke.release_manifest: rebuild the release manifest for a matching dist root when packaging is present

profiles.description: Smoke tests plus WORLDGEN-LOCK and BASELINE-UNIVERSE short-window verification.

stability.rationale: Toolchain test profile registry row for determinism-core validation coverage; support artifact remains provisional.
stability.replacement_target: toolchain matrix and CI profile consolidation

profiles.description: Determinism-core plus deterministic pack verification and negotiation handshake smoke.

stability.rationale: Toolchain test profile registry row for ecosystem validation coverage; support artifact remains provisional.
stability.replacement_target: toolchain matrix and CI profile consolidation

profiles.description: Ecosystem coverage plus dist verification when packaging exists and optional heavy convergence replay.

stability.replacement_target: toolchain matrix and CI profile consolidation

profiles.description: Build identity and descriptor emission for an environment, with release-manifest generation when a dist root exists.
